hero.description: I-Horizon Tech d.o.o. yinkampani yetekhnoloji yehlabathi esekelwe eSarajevo, ihambisa izisombululo zesoftware eziphambili kumashishini kumazwekazi amathathu.

mission.title: Umsebenzi
mission.description: Sinceda imibutho ukuba iguqule izimvo ezinamabhongo zibe ziimveliso zedijithali ezinokuthenjwa ezenza ixabiso leshishini elinokulinganiswa.
points: Lungelelanisa ukuhanjiswa kwetekhnoloji kunye neziphumo ezicacileyo zeshishini.
Yakha iinkqubo zexesha elide ezihlala zigcinwa njengoko amaqela ekhula.
Sebenzisana ngokusondeleyo nabachaphazelekayo ukusuka kwisicwangciso ukuya ekuphumezeni.

expertise.title: Ubungcali
expertise.description: Amaqela ethu ahlukeneyo adibanisa ubunzulu bobunjineli kunye nokucinga kwemveliso kwiimfumba zetekhnoloji zale mihla.
points: Uyilo lwelifu, i-DevOps automation, kunye neziseko zophuhliso ezomeleleyo.
I-AI / ML esetyenzisiweyo, ukuhamba komsebenzi kwedatha, kunye neemveliso ze-IoT.

approach.title: Indlela
approach.description: Senza ngemodeli ebonakalayo, ye-iterative egcina ukuhanjiswa kuqikelelwa ngelixa kunciphisa umngcipheko wemveliso.
points: Fumanisa: chaza ububanzi, izinto eziphambili, kunye neemetrikhi zempumelelo kwangoko.
Ukwakha: Inqanawa kwi-increments ejolise kuyo kunye neengqungquthela eziqhubekayo zempendulo.
Phucula: Ukubeka iliso kwiziphumo kunye nokuphucula ukusebenza ngokuhamba kwexesha.

cta.title: Ngaba ukulungele ukutshintsha ishishini lakho?
cta.description: Joyina uluhlu olukhulayo lweenkampani ezithembela kwi-Horizon Tech ukuhambisa izisombululo ezintsha kunye neziphumo ezizodwa.

hero.title: Qhagamshelana nathi
hero.description: Ngaba unayo iprojekthi engqondweni? Singathanda ukuva kuwe. Nxibelelana nathi ukuze sixoxe ngendlela esinokukunceda ngayo ukuzisa izimvo zakho ebomini.

form.title: Sithumelele umyalezo
form.success: Enkosi ngomyalezo wakho. Siza kubuyela kuwe kwiiyure ezingama-24-48.
form.error: Kukho into engahambanga kakuhle. Nceda uzame kwakhona okanye usithumelele i-imeyile ngqo.
form.subject: Isihloko *

placeholders.name: Igama lakho
placeholders.subject: Yintoni esinokuyinceda?
placeholders.message: Sixelele malunga neprojekthi yakho okanye uphando ...

reasons: I-AI / ML kunye neengcali zoyilo lwelifu

custom.title: Izisombululo zesiko
custom.description: Ukukhangela isisombululo esifanelekileyo? Sisebenza ngokusondeleyo nabathengi ukuqonda iimfuno ezizodwa kunye nokuhambisa isoftware yesiko eqhuba iziphumo ezinokulinganiswa.

faq.title: Ngaba unayo eminye imibuzo?
faq.description: Jonga icandelo lethu le-FAQ ukuze ufumane iimpendulo ezikhawulezayo

hero.description: Iqela elihlukeneyo leengcali zetekhnoloji, abayili, kunye nezicwangciso-qhinga zokwakha iimveliso zedijithali ezinefuthe eliphezulu kunye.

section.title: Iqela lobunkokheli
section.description: Iinkokheli ezinamava ezikhokela umbono kunye nokukhula kwe-Horizon Tech

hamza.bio: Inkokeli yombono kunye nomyili wezobuchwephesha kunye neminyaka eyi-10 + kwisoftware yeshishini, egxile kwi-AI / ML, amaqonga elifu, kunye nolwakhiwo lwemveliso olunokulinganiswa.

ahmet.bio: Ingcali ye-cybersecurity igxile kulwakhiwo lokhuseleko lweshishini, iziseko ezikhuselekileyo ze-on-prem, kunye nokuhanjiswa kokuthotyelwa kuqala kwiindawo ezilawulwayo.

culture.title: Ubomi kwi-Horizon Tech
culture.description: Sikhuthaza inkcubeko yezinto ezintsha, intsebenziswano kunye nokufunda okuqhubekayo

remoteFirst.title: Inkcubeko yokuqala ekude
remoteFirst.description: Sebenza naphi na ngeeyure eziguquguqukayo kunye nokugxila kwiziphumo, hayi indawo.

collaborative.title: Imeko-bume yentsebenziswano
collaborative.description: Iziganeko zeqela rhoqo, iiseshoni zokwabelana ngolwazi, kunye nentsebenziswano enqamlezileyo.

workLife.title: Ulungelelwaniso lomsebenzi kunye nobomi
workLife.description: Umgaqo-nkqubo weholide onobubele, inkxaso yempilo yengqondo, kunye nentlonipho yexesha lomntu.

innovation.title: Ixesha le-Innovation
innovation.description: Iipesenti ezingama-20 zexesha leeprojekthi zobuqu, ii-hackathons, kunye nokuphonononga itekhnoloji entsha.

cta.title: Ngaba uyafuna ukujoyina iqela lethu?
cta.description: Sihlala sikhangela abantu abanetalente abakhathalele ubugcisa, ubunini, kunye nezinto ezintsha.

hero.description: Joyina iqela leenjineli ezakha isoftware yokusika kubathengi behlabathi. Sebenza kude, ukhule ngokuqhubekayo, kwaye wenze impembelelo yokwenyani.

steps.title: Faka isicelo
steps.description: Ngenisa isicelo sakho kwaye siya kuyiphonononga kwisithuba seentsuku ezi-3 zeshishini.

steps.title: Incoko Yokuqala
steps.description: Umnxeba wevidiyo wemizuzu engama-30 ukuxoxa ngamava akho kunye nolindelo lwakho.

steps.title: Ubugcisa
steps.description: Udliwano-ndlebe lobuchwephesha okanye ukuzivocavoca okusebenzayo ukubonisa izakhono zakho.

steps.title: Isibonelelo
steps.description: Dibana neqela kwaye ufumane isithembiso sakho sokujoyina i-Horizon Tech.

jobs.title: Izikhundla ezivulekileyo
jobs.description: Fumana ithuba lakho elilandelayo kwaye ujoyine iqela lethu elikhulayo

listings.title: Injineli ePhezulu ye-Full-Stack
listings.description: Yakha usetyenziso lweshishini olunokulinganiswa usebenzisa i-React, Node.js, kunye neetekhnoloji zefu.

listings.title: Injineli ye-DevOps
listings.description: Yila kwaye ugcine imibhobho ye-CI / CD, iziseko zophuhliso njengekhowudi, kunye neenkqubo zokubeka iliso.

listings.title: Injineli ye-AI / ML
listings.description: Ukuphuhlisa iimodeli zokufunda ngomatshini kunye nezisombululo ze-AI kubathengi beshishini.

listings.title: Umyili weMveliso
listings.description: Yenza amava omsebenzisi amahle, anembile kwizicelo ezintsonkothileyo zeshishini.

listings.title: Umyili wezisombululo
listings.description: Yila izisombululo zobuchwephesha kunye nokukhokela abathengi ngenguqu yedijithali.

listings.title: Umbhali wezobuchwephesha
listings.description: Yenza amaxwebhu apheleleyo, izifundo kunye nomxholo wobuchwephesha.

cta.title: Imibuzo malunga nokusebenza apha?
cta.description: Singathanda ukuva kuwe. Nxibelelana nathi kwaye siya kuphendula nayiphi na imibuzo malunga nobomi kwi-Horizon Tech.

hero.description: Fumanisa ukuba sincede njani iinkampani kuwo onke amashishini ukuba ziguqule imisebenzi ngetekhnoloji esebenzayo, enefuthe eliphezulu.

items.title: Ukufuduka kwelifu kunye nokuhlaziywa
items.description: Ukufudukela kwiinkqubo zebhanki zelifa kwiziseko zelifu ze-AWS ngaphandle kwexesha lokuphumla.
items.challenge: Uyilo lwelifa lwe-monolithic olubangela imiba yokulinganisa

items.title: Iqonga lokuxilonga elixhotyiswe yi-AI
items.description: Yakha iimodeli ze-ML zohlalutyo lwemifanekiso yezonyango ngokuchanekayo kwe-95% +.
items.challenge: Iinkqubo zokuxilonga ngesandla zithatha ixesha elide kakhulu

items.title: Ideshibhodi yohlalutyo lwexesha lokwenyani
items.description: Ukuphuhliswa kweqonga le-BI elicwangcisa iziganeko ze-10M + yonke imihla.
items.challenge: Akukho mbonakalo wexesha lokwenyani kwiimetrikhi eziphambili zeshishini
items.result: Uhlalutyo lwexesha lokwenyani kunye neqonga lokuqonda

cta.title: Ngaba ulungele ukubhala ibali lakho lempumelelo?
cta.description: Makhe sithethe ngendlela esinokukunceda ngayo ufezekise iziphumo ezifanayo kunye nokulinganisa ngokuzithemba.

filters.title: Icebo lokucoca uShishino
filters.empty: Akukho zifundo zetyala zihambelana nesihluzi soshishino esikhethiweyo.

hero.description: Izifundo zobuchwephesha, ukuqonda kweshishini, kunye nezifundo ezisebenzayo ezivela kumsebenzi wokwenyani wokuhambisa.

featuredPost.title: Ikamva loPhuhliso lweFu-Native Development: Iindlela zokujonga ngo-2025
featuredPost.excerpt: Hlola iindlela zamva nje kuphuhliso lwelifu, ukusuka kulwakhiwo olungenaseva ukuya kwikhompyuter ye-edge.

posts.title: Ukwakha i-Microservices e-Scalable nge-Azure Kubernetes Service
posts.excerpt: Isikhokelo esisebenzayo sokuyila kunye nokuhambisa i-microservices usebenzisa i-AKS.

posts.title: Ukufunda ngomatshini kwimveliso: Izifundo ezifunyenweyo
posts.excerpt: Izifundo ezivavanywe kwintsimi ekusebenziseni iimodeli ze-ML kwisikali.

posts.title: Impendulo 19: Yintoni entsha kwaye kutheni ibalulekile
posts.excerpt: Ukuntywila okunzulu kwi-React 19 iimpawu kunye neziphumo zokusebenza.

newsletter.title: Bhalisela kwincwadana yethu
newsletter.description: Fumana amanqaku akutshanje, ii-tutorials, kunye neengcamango ezihanjiswe ngeveki.
newsletter.note: Akukho gaxekile. Khupha umrhumo nangaliphi na ixesha.

hero.title: I-Horizon Tech Engineering Blog
hero.description: Amanqaku entsimi kunye neepateni ezisebenzayo ezivela kumaqela akha iimveliso ze-AI, iinkqubo zeshishini, kunye namaqonga elifu athembekileyo.

profile.title: Imimiselo yenkangeleko
profile.subtitle: Lawula imimiselo kunye nezinto ozikhethayo kwi-akhawunti yakho

messages.passwordTooShort: Igama eligqithisiweyo kufuneka libe nophawu olusi-8 ubuncinane

general.title: Inkcazelo yobuqu
general.description: Hlaziya iinkcukacha zakho zobuqu kunye neenkcukacha zoqhagamshelwano
general.emailNotice: I-imeyili ayinakutshintshwa. Nxibelelana nenkxaso ukuba ufuna uncedo.

security.title: Imimiselo yokhuseleko
security.description: Lawula i-password kunye nezinto zakho ezikhethwayo zokhuseleko

preferences.title: Izinto Ezikhethwayo Zokwazisa
preferences.description: Lawula indlela obafumana ngayo uhlaziyo nezaziso

support.title: Iziko leNkxaso
support.subtitle: Fumana uncedo kwiinkonzo zethu zophuhliso lwesoftware

email.title: Inkxaso ye-imeyile
email.description: Sithumelele i-imeyile ngayo nayiphi na imibuzo

faqs.question: Zeziphi iinkonzo ezibonelelwa yi-Horizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Sibonelela ngophuhliso lwesoftware yesiko, izisombululo ze-AI / ML, ulwakhiwo lwamafu, i-DevOps, ubukrelekrele beshishini, kunye neenkonzo ze-IoT.

faqs.question: Ndiyiqala njani iprojekthi ngeHorizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Nxibelelana nathi ngefom okanye nge-imeyile ngeemfuno zakho. Siza kucwangcisa umnxeba wokufumanisa kwaye sabelane ngesindululo.

faqs.question: Ngaba ubonelela ngenkxaso eqhubekayo kunye nolondolozo?
faqs.answer: Ewe. Sinikezela ngenkxaso kunye neephakheji zolondolozo ezibandakanya ukulungiswa kwe-bug, uhlaziyo lokhuseleko, kunye nokuphuculwa kweempawu.

education.title: Izibonelelo zobuchwephesha
education.subtitle: Izikhokelo, iitutorials, kunye neendlela ezilungileyo ezivela kwiqela le-Horizon Tech

hub.title: Indawo yokuFunda
hub.description: Phonononga izixhobo zethu zobuchwephesha ezikhethiweyo kwilifu, i-AI / ML, i-DevOps, kunye nophuhliso lwesoftware yanamhlanje.
hub.note: Ezi zixhobo zisekwe kumava okwenyani eprojekthi kwaye zihlaziywa rhoqo.

categories.title: I-AI kunye nokuFunda koMatshini
categories.description: Iimodeli ze-ML, isayensi yedatha, kunye nokudityaniswa kwe-AI

categories.title: I-DevOps kunye neQonga
categories.description: CI / CD, iziseko zophuhliso njengekhowudi, ukuzenzekelayo

categories.title: Idatha kunye nohlalutyo
categories.description: I-BI, ukugcinwa kwedatha, kunye namaqonga ohlalutyo

training.title: Ngaba ufuna uqeqesho lwesiko?
training.description: Sinikezela ngeendibano zocweyo ezilungiselelwe ubunjineli kunye namaqela emveliso
training.text: Ngaba ufuna uqeqesho lweqela lezandla? Sibonelela ngeendibano zocweyo zesiko kulwakhiwo lwamafu, i-DevOps, kunye neendlela zokuhambisa zangoku.

unauthorized.title: Ukufikelela akuvumelekanga
unauthorized.description: Awunayo imvume yokungena kweli phepha. Qhagamshelana nomphathi wakho ukuba ucinga ukuba le yimpazamo.

notFound.title: Iphepha alifumaneki
notFound.description: Indlela oyicelileyo ayikho okanye sele ihambisiwe. Makhe sikubuyisele kwisiphelo esifanelekileyo se-Horizon Tech.

runtime.description: Ingxaki engalindelekanga yaphazamisa ukunikezelwa. Ungaphinda uzame ngokukhuselekileyo, okanye ubuyele kwiphepha lasekhaya.
